title: juno magnifica
intro: Juno magnifica, also known as the "Queen of the Andes", is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its leaves, roots, and flowers, which have been used in traditional medicine for centuries to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Juno magnifica include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and even alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and asthma. In terms of herbal preparations, Juno magnifica can be consumed as a tea, made by infusing its leaves and flowers in hot water, or used in capsule form to reap its medicinal benefits.
